MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., specially appearing for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 437C.

This matter was not contested. The Court notes that there is no appearance by the other side.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment is granted.

Plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted

This is a collection matter brought by plaintiff to recover monies owed pursuant to a credit card agreement between the bank and defendant. Plaintiff served a request for admissions on defendant to which it never received a response from defendant. A meet and confer letter also went unanswered.

There is no opposition in this matter as to the fact that defendant owes the bank a debt and as to the amount thereof. Because defendant has not responded to the bank's request for admission, plaintiff's motion for an order deeming true the matters enumerated in its request for admissions is GRANTED.

Counsel for plaintiff is directed to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling by email to Judge Pro Tem Philip Ward at psw@hassard.com for review and execution

Judge Pro Tem: Philip Ward; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
